message:
fix: add -a flag to lsof in FindAllDoltListeners to AND selection criteria (gt-lzdp)

Without -a, lsof ORs the -c (command name) and -i (network) selectors,
causing FindAllDoltListeners to match ANY process with TCP listeners —
not just dolt processes. This made gt health report normal macOS system
processes (rapportd, ControlCenter, Dropbox, Discord, etc.) as zombies.
